retrieved_result: Sara Moulton's Turkey Tips by ABC News Nov. 25, 2004 -- Email: Good Morning America's Food Editor Sara Moulton has been checking out your various Thanksgiving Day cooking questions for weeks. Moulton has answered some of the most frequent and most pressing cooking dilemmas in her online turkey Q and A.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses turkey cooking tips, not database query optimization; thus not relevant.
